calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

Ms. Friedeberg stated that the reserve was held initially for two years for tax reasons, acknowledged that they held on to it too long and stated that it was ready to be distributed about one year ago. Ms. Friedeberg also stated that they have been in contact with the Beneficiaries and that the assets were invested. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Jones. (Not Reported)

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

Mr. Feder presented oral argument to support his position. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court granted the petition, (subject to review of the written order) stating that the fees would be reduced.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (34 Point Lobos, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Jewish Family & Childrens Services ("JFCS"). Jill Rudee from JFCS also present.

The sale was confirmed at $779,000.00, the Court granted the petition, (upon review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $779,000.00 is required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
